title: Few-Shot Adaptation for Vision-Language Models
summary: Proposed GaCoCoOp with fixed visual attribute tokens for few-shot CLIP adaptation, improving novel class accuracy by +6.31% over CoOp and +1.93% over CoCoOp on Oxford Flowers dataset.

title: Computer Vision Liquid Height Measurement
summary: Achieved ±3mm accuracy in non-contact liquid measurement using pixel-to-metric ratio calibration and OpenCV checkerboard pattern detection for real-world dimension extraction.

title: DeliverooAgents
summary: Built two autonomous agents for a grid-based parcel-delivery simulation game using an event-driven client and BDI architecture.

title: Watermarking Decision Tree Ensembles
summary: Co-authored a novel approach to verifiable ownership of tree-ensemble models through trigger-set watermarking with minimal accuracy overhead. Published at EDBT 2025.
